title: Seri's 3D Mace v2 [128x]
description: Upgrade your mace with a brand-new 3D design! ⚔️💥
body:
# Upgrade your mace with a brand-new 3D design! ⚔️💥
 **This texture pack gives the mace a detailed, realistic look that’s perfect for battles 🛡️** **medieval builds 🏰, or fantasy adventures 🐉.**
 
## **✨ Features**

**⚔️ Custom 3D model                  – detailed and striking mace design.**

**🎨 High-quality textures             – sharp, clean, and optimized for performance.**

**🧭 Perfect for RPG & medieval packs – fits seamlessly into immersive roleplay servers.**

**🔧 Lightweight & compatible         – works smoothly with most other resource packs.**

![Mace Preview-](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a729743075d380fce16086089b89a524a1132da5_0.webp)

## **🔗 Compatibility**
 
 **🕹️ Works with Minecraft 1.21+ (adjust if needed).**

 **⚡ Compatible with OptiFine, Iris, and Sodium.**

 **🌄 Can be combined with shaders for even more realism.**

## **📜 Notes**

🎮 This is a texture-only resource pack – it won’t change gameplay mechanics.

🏹 Best used with default or medieval-style packs for full effect.
